title: Chapter 101
content:
Chapter 101: Taking the Beast Girls Outside the City Walls to Let Them Play

After handing over the wine as thanks for the robe, I returned to the church. I’d just been wandering around, so it was probably around 4 PM. In the congregation seats, Rafilia-san was teaching the local people about edible wild plants and flowers. I don’t think they understood her at all, but about three capybara girls were also sitting there. They probably weren’t interested in the lecture itself — they just liked how comfortable it felt.

When I went to the courtyard, Iferasky came leaping at me.

She licked all over my face — not just my cheeks, but my nose and lips too. After licking me thoroughly, she pulled back, then started stomping excitedly in place and pointed into the distance, snorting heavily.

"You want to run outside, huh?"

"Pi!"

She jumped on me again and resumed her licking attack.

"Alright, alright. Wait a second."

Since she wouldn’t let go while hugging me, I ended up holding her face-to-face. It was a position that looked like it might connect us, but we weren’t actually linked.

I called out to the Rian sisters who were curled up nearby.

"I’m going outside the city walls to run around. Want to come with me?"

"We’ll go!"

"I’ll call everyone! Woof!"

When the younger Rian barked, Letree and her daughter, along with Shepa, came running from wherever they had been.

"Alright. Let’s all go for a run together."

I filled a leather pouch with water and prepared, then left the city gate with Iferasky and the five dog girls.

The capybara girls showed zero interest in running and none of them followed.

The moment the vast wilderness came into view, all the beast girls’ tails started wagging furiously and their eyes sparkled with excitement.

"Don’t go too far, okay?"

"Okaaay!" ×4

"Pi!"

The four dog girls and Iferasky started running freely in different directions.

Letree stayed beside me.

"Um... Masaharu-sama."

"Yes?"

"Could you please stay still for a moment?"

"Sure."

"Excuse me then."

With that, Letree crouched down and lifted up my robe.

Wait, is she planning to suck my dick while her daughters are playing?!

There’s a gatekeeper right over there — Beat might see us?!

To be honest, I wanted her to lick it. This morning, the way she handled my dick with her hand was incredible. If that masterful technique extended to her tongue...? I might cum after just a few licks.

Damn. We’re on the west side of the gate. The shadows stretch toward the gate, so it’s easy to be seen...? Or would the angle hide us?

The rectangular city wall has gates on all four sides, so no matter where you are, you can be seen from somewhere along the wall. There’s no blind spot from all the soldiers.

How the hell am I supposed to enjoy adult techniques without anyone noticing...?

Sniff sniff...

Hm?

Instead of sucking my dick, Letree was smelling it.

"Masaharu-sama’s penis smells like wine and elf..."

"Ah, um..."

As expected of a dog girl — her nose is sharp. This morning I poured wine into the elf’s ass and then put it in...

"I can imagine what you did for the elf scent, but why does it smell like wine? If your urine smells like wine, it might be a disease."

"No need to worry. I just spilled some wine."

"I see. That’s a relief. By the way, Masaharu-sama. Have you met any other beast people besides us?"

"Eh? I don’t think so... There was a market with a lot of people, so maybe there were some beast people there."

"I see."

"Is something wrong?"

"No. Dog girls and horse girls are friendly toward humans, but some beast races harbor hostility toward them."

"Ah, I understand. Thanks for the warning."

"This scent is probably from a fox, so it shouldn’t be a big problem. It’s just surprising that you ended up with a fox scent on you in the city, since they don’t interact much with humans."

"A fox, huh..."

Fox ears, fox tail, "desu wa" speech pattern, legal loli who says she doesn’t want to get pregnant with a human child...

If I had passed one in the city, there’s no way I wouldn’t have noticed. She wasn’t there, right?

Thump.

Letree hugged me tightly from the front. So soft...!

"I’ll overwrite it with my scent."

"Eh?"

"I won’t hand my Master over to some fox. Woof!"

When she barked cutely, the dog girls who had been racing around in the wasteland suddenly stopped, looked over, and then came sprinting toward us. They jumped on me one after another, and in no time at all I was surrounded by a pile of beast girls licking and pressing against me in a chaotic dogpile. They were all desperately trying to reach the center to lick me.

My robe easily opened up since it was already split on both sides, making it easy for them to lick. My sides, arms, waist — pretty much everywhere was being licked.

In the confusion, I groped someone’s breasts or ass, but none of them minded. What a harem!

I see. With this, my scent will definitely be overwritten by the dog girls’ scent, completely erasing any fox smell. I patted their heads. Their fluffy tails and smooth hair felt so good.

"Pi!"

Ah. Iferasky, who was late, was trying to push her way in.

Oh. She’s surprisingly strong. She shoved the dog girls aside and clung tightly to me. Maybe horse beast people really are stronger than dog girls.

Jealous because I was so popular? Iferasky hugged me with her whole body.

Thinking about it, thanks to this girl’s rampage we were able to reach Monban, and I might owe all this fun to her. There, there. I’ll stroke her firm, toned butt.

Hm?

"Hey, wait!"

Iferasky crouched down and buried her face in my crotch. She was clearly planning to suck it! She must have targeted it because I was hard from being surrounded by girls.

"Everyone, back off. Get back for a second."

Lick lick. Lick lick.

No good. They were only thinking about swarming me. I was completely like a zookeeper who had brought food.

Argh!

"Get off!"

I tried to pinch their nipples to pull them off, but only Iferasky knew where my nipples were! Pinching randomly wouldn’t work, and pinching the nipples of 12-year-old little Letree or 14-year-old Shepa through their clothes would be too cruel, so I decided to poke their anuses from over their clothes instead.

I moved quickly and poked each of them in the ass through their clothes.

They all let out small yelps and pulled away. Only Letree stayed, letting out a sweet "Ahhn~" and refusing to move.

"You can poke a little harder if you’d like."

"What are you saying in front of your daughters?"

"You’re the one fingering your daughter’s asshole while fully erect. What are you saying?"

...She had a perfect, irrefutable point.

As expected of an adult — flawless logical armor!

"Anyway."

I grabbed Letree’s upper arm and pulled her off.

I held up my index finger toward the beast girls who tried to approach again.

Shuffle...

They inched closer but didn’t dare jump on me.

It was fun, but if I kept playing around with all of them I wouldn’t last. I might be stronger in arm strength, but I didn’t think I could win a stamina contest against six of them. Especially Iferasky and Letree’s sex drives — I wanted to let them vent at least a little before nightfall.
